title: Kwheli's Cobblemon Modpack
description: This modpack adds more content to the world of Cobblemon while still keeping the vanilla feel. New Pokémon, fakemon, custom buildings that have great loot, legendaries, custom food recipes and much more!
body:
This modpack adds plenty of additional content to the world of Cobblemon. QOL, Performance, Expansive Content, Adventure and More Pokemon are the main focus of this pack. If you want to keep the causal vanilla feel of Minecraft but have alot more to do in Cobblemon itself with more catching, exploring and raiding dungeons with your friends this is perfect for you. More content will be added to this pack along with custom content as we move forward.

This pack is updated to Cobblemons most latest 1.7 update. Recommended amount of ram is 4-8gbs. Installed resource packs are optional but are more engaging.
